body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.

**Evaluation of the peak experience scale as arapid assessment tool for the strength of apsychoactive experience with 5-MeO-DMT.** — Frontiers in psychology (2025). PMID: . DOI: 10.1021/acsptsci.0c00194. Score: 29. Athree-item Peak Experience Scale (PES) was developed to rapidly evaluate the strength of the psychoactive experience, and to guide the dosing regimen, of the psychedelic 5-methoxy-N,N-dimethyltryptamine (5-MeO-DMT; mebufotenin). This paper aims to compare the PES with arange of established questionnaires designed to evaluate the psychedelic experience.
